form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run 3rd of 10 at Barcaldine Hcp on April 4 over 1300m, 4 len behind Hurtle carrying 56kg at $4.40. Before that 3rd in a small field at this track Hcp on March 21 over 1200m, 3 len behind Here He Looms carrying 56kg at $2. Racing well and looks a strong top-three chance.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 4th of 8 at Barcaldine Bm60 on April 4 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind Bold Smuggler with 64kg at $7. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by a nose at Barcaldine Cl3-Sw May 20 over 1200m on a soft track defeating Growl with 62kg at $6.50. Not far away fresh and worth keeping safe.
